title: Stage Trace
description: Result of a reachability trace from the tracer agent. Must pass before a finding can be promoted to confirmed.

trace_result.description: Whether attacker-controlled input reaches the sink

entry_point.description: The external entry point where attacker input enters

call_chain.description: The function call path from entry point to sink

items.description: One step in the chain: file:function → next:function

defenses_checked.description: Every defense examined on the path and whether it blocked the attacker

verdict.description: Whether the defense stops the attacker

attacker_model.description: Who can trigger this path (unauthenticated, low-priv user, etc.)

impact_if_reachable.description: What an attacker gains by reaching this sink (only meaningful when REACHABLE)

unreachable_reason.description: Why the sink is unreachable (required when UNREACHABLE)
